articles.title: AMD Extends Socket AM5 Lifespan to 2029
articles.description: AMD confirms Socket AM5 will remain relevant until 2029, celebrating the success of its AM4 platform. This move strengthens AMD's competitive edge against Intel.
articles.impact: AMD's longevity plan boosts consumer confidence.

articles.title: Dell Launches $699 Touch-Screen XPS 13 to Compete with Apple
articles.description: Dell's new XPS 13 laptop, priced at $699, directly challenges Apple's MacBook Neo. The device features a sleek design and touch-screen capabilities.
articles.impact: Dell aims to capture budget-conscious consumers.

articles.title: Sony's State of Play Menu Leaked for Alamo Drafthouse
articles.description: A special menu for Sony's upcoming State of Play event at Alamo Drafthouse has leaked. Fans eagerly await the announcements set for June 2.

articles.title: 868-BACK: A Cyberpunk Roguelike Revival
articles.description: The classic roguelike 868-HACK returns as 868-BACK, offering a more accessible experience. Players can now enjoy its challenging gameplay on modern platforms.
articles.impact: Old-school gamers rejoice with this revival.

articles.title: Samsung Messages to Shut Down: Transition to Google Messages
articles.description: Samsung Messages will cease operations in July 2026, urging users to transition to Google Messages. Early action is recommended to avoid complications.
articles.impact: Users must adapt quickly to avoid disruptions.

articles.title: Unannounced Rayman Game Leaks Online
articles.description: Details of a new Rayman game, titled Rayman Origins: Enhanced Edition, have leaked online. The game is expected to retail for $1999.99.
articles.impact: Fans excited for the return of Rayman.

articles.title: AMC's Decline Linked to Tragic History
articles.description: AMC's downfall can be traced back to a pivotal moment in its history. The company once competed fiercely but faltered under new ownership.
articles.impact: Understanding AMC's past reveals industry lessons.

articles.title: New Apple TV and HomePod Mini Launch Imminent
articles.description: Apple's new Apple TV 4K and HomePod mini models are reportedly ready for launch. A new Siri remote is also rumored to be in the works.
key_points: New Apple TV and HomePod mini
articles.impact: Apple continues to innovate in home tech.

articles.title: Apple's Next Target: The Eyewear Market
articles.description: Apple aims to disrupt the $200 billion eyewear industry, similar to its impact on watches. Smart glasses are expected by late 2027.
articles.impact: Apple's entry could reshape eyewear industry.

articles.title: 15 New Motorcycles to Check Out Now
articles.description: A roundup of the latest motorcycles, featuring standout models from Borgo Panigale and other brands. Exciting options for enthusiasts are available now.

articles.title: T-Mobile Tops JD Power Customer Satisfaction Survey
articles.description: JD Power's latest survey reveals T-Mobile ranks highest in customer satisfaction among phone carriers. Verizon and AT&T trail behind.

articles.title: Reality May Be a VR Simulation, Claims Scientist
articles.description: Scientist Donald Hoffman suggests reality resembles a VR simulation rather than traditional space-time. His theory challenges conventional perceptions of existence.
articles.impact: This theory could reshape our understanding.

articles.title: 8 Must-Have Gadgets This Week
articles.description: A roundup of the most notable tech gadgets released recently. Stay updated on the latest innovations in technology.
articles.impact: Tech enthusiasts won't want to miss these.

articles.title: Tips to Improve Pixel Battery Life
articles.description: Simple habits can significantly enhance battery life for Google Pixel users. Small changes lead to better performance and less anxiety.

articles.title: Samsung Employee Spotted with Galaxy Z Fold 8
articles.description: A Samsung employee was seen using the Galaxy Z Fold 8 in public, hinting at its upcoming release. The device's features remain under wraps.
articles.impact: Anticipation builds for Samsung's latest foldable.
